Canadian Health Measures Survey (CHMS) Cycle 4

Source: R/data.R
cycle4.Rd

This is dummy data representing the fourth cycle of the Canadian Health Measures Survey (CHMS). The CHMS survey is conducted by Statistics Canada.

Usage

data(cycle4)

Source

Statistics Canada

Examples

data(cycle4)
str(cycle4)
#> 'data.frame':	50 obs. of  82 variables:
#>  $ alc_11  : int  1 1 1 2 1 2 2 2 1 1 ...
#>  $ alc_17  : int  2 1 1 1 1 2 2 1 2 1 ...
#>  $ alc_18  : int  1 2 2 1 2 2 1 1 1 2 ...
#>  $ alcdwky : int  78 23 6 78 22 25 31 6 26 41 ...
#>  $ ammdmva1: int  84 364 193 106 76 197 248 199 159 249 ...
#>  $ ammdmva2: int  278 269 365 133 346 128 217 105 368 185 ...
#>  $ ammdmva3: int  103 308 318 198 209 348 400 224 257 176 ...
#>  $ ammdmva4: int  298 38 236 164 106 32 82 395 353 276 ...
#>  $ ammdmva5: int  201 15 196 177 176 11 65 49 203 174 ...
#>  $ ammdmva6: int  203 210 218 183 351 154 118 343 66 109 ...
#>  $ ammdmva7: int  370 157 188 310 188 56 381 37 83 318 ...
#>  $ bir_14  : int  5213 4275 2409 1746 3480 1616 1697 5955 2463 3278 ...
#>  $ bpmdpbpd: int  142 137 58 131 100 98 84 64 131 141 ...
#>  $ bpmdpbps: int  207 101 92 196 152 79 117 148 97 163 ...
#>  $ ccc_32  : int  2 2 2 2 2 2 2 1 1 2 ...
#>  $ ccc_51  : int  2 1 1 2 1 2 1 1 2 2 ...
#>  $ ccc_61  : int  1 1 2 1 2 2 1 1 2 1 ...
#>  $ ccc_63  : int  2 2 1 1 2 1 2 2 2 1 ...
#>  $ ccc_81  : int  1 1 2 1 2 1 1 2 2 1 ...
#>  $ clc_age : int  73 33 22 47 74 22 65 47 48 58 ...
#>  $ clc_sex : int  2 2 2 2 2 2 2 2 1 1 ...

#>  $ dhh_ms  : int  6 6 3 6 3 4 1 6 4 2 ...

#>  $ edudr04 : int  2 3 1 3 3 3 2 2 1 1 ...

#>  $ fmh_12  : int  62 74 7 65 76 43 39 48 18 8 ...
